mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS artwork_id, a.artist_id, a.title, a.artwork_no, a.current_price, a.inventory_available, a.status, ( SELECT am.media_url FROM artwork_media am WHERE am.artwork_id = a.id ORDER BY am.is_main DESC, am.sort_no ASC, am.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS cover_url FROM artwork a WHERE a.id = #{artworkId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, province, city, district, detail_address FROM shipping_address WHERE id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_order ( order_no, buyer_user_id, order_type, order_status, payment_status, delivery_type, address_id, goods_amount, freight_amount, discount_amount, pay_amount, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{buyerUserId}, #{orderType}, #{orderStatus}, #{paymentStatus}, #{deliveryType}, #{addressId}, #{goodsAmount}, #{freightAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{remark} )

INSERT INTO trade_order_item ( order_id, artwork_id, artist_id, item_type, sku_no, item_title, cover_url, unit_price, quantity, subtotal_amount ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{artwork.artworkId}, #{artwork.artistId}, 'ARTWORK', #{artwork.artworkNo}, #{artwork.title}, #{coverUrl}, #{artwork.currentPrice}, 1, #{artwork.currentPrice} )

INSERT INTO collection_certificate ( certificate_no, certificate_type, artwork_id, owner_user_id, order_id, share_ratio, owner_display_mode, certificate_status, issued_at ) VALUES ( #{certificateNo}, 'ELECTRONIC', #{artworkId}, #{ownerUserId}, #{orderId}, 1.0000, 'PRIVATE', 'VALID', NOW() )
INSERT INTO artwork_ownership_flow ( artwork_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, flow_type, order_id, flow_remark ) VALUES ( #{artworkId}, NULL, #{toUserId}, 'PRIMARY_BUY', #{orderId}, '首次购买生成持有记录' )
mapper.update: UPDATE artwork SET inventory_available = inventory_available - 1, status = CASE WHEN inventory_available - 1 <= 0 THEN 'COLLECTED' ELSE status END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{artworkId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND inventory_available > 0
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS order_id, o.order_no, o.buyer_user_id, o.order_type, o.order_status, o.payment_status, o.delivery_type, o.address_id, o.goods_amount, o.freight_amount, o.discount_amount, o.pay_amount, o.remark, o.paid_at, o.completed_at, o.created_at, oi.item_title, oi.cover_url, oi.unit_price, oi.quantity, oi.subtotal_amount, oi.artwork_id, oi.artist_id FROM trade_order o INNER JOIN trade_order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND o.buyer_user_id = #{buyerUserId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_mobile, province, city, district, detail_address FROM shipping_address WHERE id = #{addressId} LIMIT 1
SELECT shipment_no, logistics_company, logistics_code, tracking_no, shipment_status, consigned_at, signed_at FROM shipment_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
